title: Kick Bastards
short_description: High-speed parkour and kicking through hellish gauntlets — push for absurd velocity and fight back with your feet.
description: GO FAST, KICK ASS! Kick Bastards combines high-speed parkour with intense kicking action. Race faster and faster, perform daring moves, and push your limits in pursuit of unrivalled speed. The armies of Hell are coming; fight back and become a kicking legend!
